agent_stats.outcome_reasoning: The document defines an Article 4 Direction for the Wroxham Conservation Area, specifically centered on Charles Close. Page 2 provides a clear site plan. The match at Charles Close, Wroxham (NR12 8TU area) was exceptionally strong with 1263 inliers, near-perfect scale consistency (0.999), and 91% road name agreement (matching 11 out of 12 roads identified in the text/map). The resulting polygon accurately captures the boundary shown on the map.
